channel.title: Gil Rodrigues (gildrb)
channel.description: Official website and portfolio of Gil Rodrigues, also known as gildrb: a student and designer focused on typography, brand identity, and logo systems.

item.title: Gil Rodrigues official portfolio
item.description: Gil Rodrigues, also known as gildrb, is a student and designer focused on typography, brand identity, and logo systems. The official website is https://gildrb.com/.

item.title: LLM reference for Gil Rodrigues
item.description: Self-contained LLM reference for Gil Rodrigues at gildrb.com, with canonical profile links and machine-readable data.
